purpose: Introduces the master agent's role: planning, dispatching workers, monitoring, and finalizing swarms. Enumerates what the master may write (initialization.json, logs.json, master_state.json, metrics.json, plan.json) and what it must never touch (progress files, project source code). Establishes the master's invariants that hooks enforce at runtime.
gotchas: validate-master-write hook will block any attempt by the master to edit files in {project_root}
Master must populate initialization.json before any worker is dispatched
patterns: Coordinator pattern with strict write-ownership boundaries
conventions: Master uses Task tool to spawn workers; never invokes implementation tools directly
